fixes_applied.description: Created missing GitHub Actions workflow file for Maven build pipeline
changes_made: Created .github/workflows/build.yml with complete Maven build configuration
Added workflow triggers: push, pull_request, workflow_dispatch
Configured Java 17 environment with Temurin distribution
Added Maven build steps: clean, compile, test, jacoco:report, package, verify
Configured dynamic source folder support (defaults to 'code' folder)
Added artifact upload for build outputs and test reports
Added build logs upload for debugging

fixes_applied.description: Workflow dispatch API endpoint failure resolved by creating workflow file
changes_made: Workflow file creation enables GitHub Actions API to dispatch builds
workflow_dispatch trigger added to allow manual and programmatic build triggers
API endpoint will now return 204 No Content on successful dispatch instead of 404

next_steps: Verify workflow file is accessible via GitHub API
Test workflow dispatch to ensure 204 response
Create code/ folder structure with Maven project if not exists
Run build to identify any Maven compilation or test errors
Address any subsequent build failures in next iteration
notes: Primary configuration error resolved. The missing GitHub Actions workflow file has been created with comprehensive Maven build configuration including JaCoCo coverage reporting. The workflow supports dynamic source folder configuration and defaults to 'code' folder. Next build attempt should successfully dispatch the workflow, though it may fail if the code/ folder or Maven project structure is missing.
